_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Applied mathematics and statistics involves applying analytical methods including exploratory data analysis, visualisation and statistical testing to help make accurate recommendations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of descriptive statistics, including measures of central tendency, dispersion, distribution shape, and correlation, and how to interpret each in a business context.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-008 (AB, cosine: 0.459), AI-K-002 (AI, cosine: 0.459).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.450). Shared vocabulary: [statistics]. DDaT-only terms [accurate, analysis, analytical, applied, applying, data] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, central, context, correlation, descriptive, dispersion] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.864, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DDaT element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Applied mathematics and statistics involves applying analytical methods includin" and "Knowledge of descriptive statistics, including measures of central tendency, dis" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 ≈ STS 0.450 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [statistics] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.8%. Shared tokens: [statistics]. DDaT-only: [accurate, analysis, analytical, applied, applying, data]. WIDAI-only: [business, central, context, correlation, descriptive, dispersion].
